description: v0.3.0 made LinkType forward-compat with an Unknown(String) variant. Status (src/task.rs:47-96) still hard-errors on unknown variants via #[serde(rename_all=snake_case)]. A future bl that adds e.g. triaged/backlog/archived would brick older clients trying to load any task file carrying the new value. Mirror the LinkType pattern: add Unknown(String), custom Deserialize that falls through, keep Status::parse strict (CLI entry point). Status loses Copy (becomes Clone). precedence() needs an Unknown arm - lowest precedence so it never accidentally wins a conflict resolution. Round-trip test in tests/gates_compat.rs style. Mind the 300-line cap on src/task.rs; may need to split Status into its own module like link.rs was.
title: Lenient Status deserialization (preserve unknown)
